creator: nacai@iname.com
text:
I have been fixed the ORBit port to follow the latest version.
The GNOME port heavily depends on this port.

Yukihioro Nakai
---------------
diff -ruN ORBit.orig/Makefile ORBit/Makefile
--- ORBit.orig/Makefile	Mon Sep 13 18:56:16 1999
+++ ORBit/Makefile	Mon Sep 13 18:59:03 1999
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   orbit
-# Version required:		0.4.93
+# Version required:		0.4.94
 # Date Created:			16 Aug 1998
 # Whom:				Chia-liang Kao <clkao@CirX.ORG>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/devel/ORBit/Makefile,v 1.22 1999/08/25 05:47:16 obrien Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	ORBit-0.4.93
+DISTNAME=	ORBit-0.4.94
 CATEGORIES=	devel gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNOME}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	sources/ORBit
diff -ruN ORBit.orig/files/md5 ORBit/files/md5
--- ORBit.orig/files/md5	Mon Sep 13 18:56:16 1999
+++ ORBit/files/md5	Mon Sep 13 18:59:14 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (ORBit-0.4.93.tar.gz) = 8449f1491235ae6019dc702fbb0da3b5
+MD5 (ORBit-0.4.94.tar.gz) = d975726e01c936cb047ff8cb3dad9b50
diff -ruN ORBit.orig/pkg/PLIST ORBit/pkg/PLIST
--- ORBit.orig/pkg/PLIST	Mon Sep 13 18:56:16 1999
+++ ORBit/pkg/PLIST	Mon Sep 13 19:11:08 1999
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
 include/ORBitservices/LName.pidl
 include/ORBitutil/basic_types.h
 include/ORBitutil/compat.h
+include/ORBitutil/os-specifics.h
 include/ORBitutil/thread-safety.h
 include/ORBitutil/trace.h
 include/ORBitutil/util.h
